Based on the synthesized evidence, Travis has the most direct opportunity as he was present at the crime scene (the labyrinth) with Isabella on the day of her death and admitted they were alone together. He also has access to the murder weapon (frog poison) through his tattoo ink collection. While Russell has a strong motive and access to poison, his opportunity is less clear as he was preparing for a trip and not explicitly placed at the scene. Travis's motive (Isabella exposing his illegal activities) is also compelling. Therefore, Travis is the most likely murderer.
